falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the HOLD signal, indicating a trend reversal rather than consolidation.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would signal a breakout or strong directional move, invalidating the consolidation phase implied by the HOLD.

falsification_conditions.condition: Pattern match to bottom_2022_may_luna drops below 60% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A significant decline in pattern similarity would indicate the current setup no longer aligns with the historical bottom, invalidating the original analysis.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
